content: {"file": "backend/ingestion/ingest_code.py", "summary": "This file contains logic for ingesting code from a Maven multi-module monorepo into ChromaDB, applying specific chunking rules based on the programming language and structure of the files. It processes Java, TypeScript/Angular, JavaScript/jQuery files, skipping HTML files and certain directories.", "rules": [{"name": "_is_skipped_path", "description": "Determines if a file path should be skipped during ingestion.", "conditions": ["path contains any part in SKIP_DIR_NAMES set"], "actions": ["return True"]}, {"name": "chunk_java_file", "description": "Chunks Java files into classes and methods, indexing entity classes separately.", "conditions": ["file suffix is .java"], "actions": ["split file by class and method", "index entity classes to sf_jpa_entities and sf_codebase"]}, {"name": "chunk_ts_file", "description": "Chunks TypeScript/Angular files based on Angular decorators or treats them as services if no decorator is found.", "conditions": ["file suffix is .ts"], "actions": ["split file by component, service, module"]}, {"name": "chunk_js_file", "description": "Chunks JavaScript/jQuery files into functions, falling back to whole-file chunking if no functions are detected.", "conditions": ["file suffix is .js"], "actions": ["split file by function or whole file"]}], "dependencies": ["langchain_core.documents", "langchain_text_splitters.RecursiveCharacterTextSplitter", "pathlib.Path"]}
